g.text: Final Hash Output H² (256 bits → 64 hex chars)
Total: 256 bits | Publicly verifiable — no hidden trapdoor
Davies-Meyer feed-forward: H¹ = compress(IV, M₀) + IV

text.tspan: If input fits in one block (≤ 55 bytes after padding marker),
loop runs once. H¹ IS the final digest. No second compress call.

g.text: Encoding: each H[i] → 4 bytes big-endian → 8 hex chars
NEVER memcpy native uint32_t — wrong on little-endian x86
Total: 512 bits — exactly one compression input
Triggered when msg len ≥ 56 bytes (len mod 64 ≥ 56)
Total: 512 bits — the extra block holds only length
Key: Block 1 starts from H¹, NOT from IV
